title: Kersia laburnifolia

 Kerria laburnifolia  is a shrub-like flowering plant in the family Rosaceae.

The bioactive constituents of Kerria laburnifolia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
